
NICOLÁS MARTÍNEZ
Data Scientist | Machine Learning Engineer
nicolas.martinez@example.com | +54 11 3333 3333 | Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Data scientist with 8+ years building production ML systems. Shipped
recommendation engines serving 10M+ daily active users. Specialized in
NLP and recommendation systems.

WORK HISTORY

Sigma Tech | Lead Data Scientist | 2021 - 2024
- Built end-to-end recommendation pipeline on Databricks.
- Mentored 4 junior data scientists.

Tau Analytics | Senior Data Scientist | 2018 - 2021
- Designed churn prediction models (precision 0.87).

Upsilon AI | Data Scientist | 2016 - 2018
- Developed NER models for Spanish text corpora.

EDUCATION
MSc in Machine Learning, Universidad de San Andrés, 2014 - 2016
Licenciatura en Matemática, UBA, 2008 - 2014

SKILLS
Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, SQL, Databricks, Kubernetes, MLflow
